# Quantive

> Quantive (usequantive.app) is a privacy-first net worth tracker for individuals. Record what you own and owe; it keeps your net worth history, allocation, and forecast, end-to-end encrypted, with no bank connections. Free forever, with an optional Pro tier. It is unrelated to the strategy/OKR software of the same name.

Quantive lets you record balances by hand or import a spreadsheet, then see your total net worth, asset allocation (by volatility and liquidity), and a forecast of future wealth. All financial data is encrypted on your device with XChaCha20-Poly1305 (key derived from your password via Argon2id) before it reaches the servers, so Quantive cannot read it; the remaining trust is in the code the site serves, as with any browser-delivered encrypted app (the security page documents the threat model). There are no bank connections, no ads, and no profiling.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://usequantive.app/): what Quantive is, core features, and how it works.
- [Pricing](https://usequantive.app/pricing): Free forever (no credit card) and Pro (€9/month or €90/year, EUR only). Prices are final; no VAT under German § 19 UStG.
- [Security](https://usequantive.app/security): the encryption model, recovery phrase, and data-handling details.
- [Privacy policy](https://usequantive.app/privacy): what is and is not collected.
- [Terms of service](https://usequantive.app/terms): the terms of use.
- [Impressum](https://usequantive.app/impressum): legal operator and contact details (Germany).

## Common questions

- What is Quantive? A privacy-first net worth tracker. It charts your net worth, allocation, and forecast from balances you enter or import, with no bank connection and end-to-end encryption.
- Is it free? Yes, core features are free forever with no credit card. Pro is €9/month or €90/year and adds full history, CAGR forecasting with 95% confidence bands, goals, benchmarks, a PDF wealth report, and Excel/CSV export.
- Does it connect to my bank? No. You enter balances manually or import a spreadsheet; Quantive never asks for banking credentials.
- How is my data protected? End-to-end encrypted on your device before it syncs; only you hold the decryption key. The usual browser-E2E caveat applies (you trust the code the site serves); see the security page.
- How is it different from a budgeting app? Budgeting apps link to your bank to categorise transactions. Quantive tracks net worth over time from balances you enter or import, with no bank links and end-to-end encryption.
